function.name: _wb_set_curr_appid
function.description: Set the application ID (appId) for the current session context. Before calling any application-level plugin (such as querying app config, tables, workflows, etc.), you must call this plugin first to switch the target of subsequent plugins to the specified application. After calling _wb_set_curr_appid, you need to call _query_app_user to get the current user's roles and permissions in that application.

appId.description: The appId to switch to. It must be an existing application in the current company that the current user has permission to access.
